name: WaveConnector
description: Connects to the Wave Accounting GraphQL API (Businesses, Customers, Invoices, Products, Accounts, Transactions, Sales Taxes, Users) using a personal access token. Supports customer/invoice/product creation, business and ledger queries, and KB sync of customers + invoices.

install_fields.label: Wave Personal Access Token
install_fields.help: From Wave Dashboard → Settings → API Access → Manage Applications → Create / view tokens. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every GraphQL request.

install_fields.label: Default Business ID
install_fields.help: Default Wave Business ID for methods that take a business_id arg. When set, the per-call argument can be omitted.

install_fields.label: Wave GraphQL Base URL
install_fields.help: Wave public GraphQL endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Client-side soft cap. Wave's documented limit is 60/min/token.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates access_token and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Wave GraphQL connectivity by querying { user { id } }.

apis.name: List Businesses
apis.description: Pages through the authenticated user's businesses via the GraphQL `businesses` query.

apis.name: Get Business
apis.description: Fetches a single business by ID via the `business(id)` query.

apis.name: List Customers
apis.description: Pages through customers of a business via `business.customers`.

apis.name: Create Customer
apis.description: Creates a customer in a business via the `customerCreate` mutation.

apis.name: List Invoices
apis.description: Pages through invoices via `business.invoices`. Optional status filter (DRAFT, SAVED, SENT, PAID, OVERDUE).

apis.name: Create Invoice
apis.description: Creates a draft invoice via the `invoiceCreate` mutation. items: [{product_id, quantity?, unit_price?, description?}].

apis.name: Create Product
apis.description: Creates a product via the `productCreate` mutation.

apis.name: List Accounts
apis.description: Returns the chart of accounts via `business.accounts`.

apis.name: List Transactions
apis.description: Pages through ledger transactions via `business.transactions`, with optional from/to ISO dates.

apis.name: List Sales Taxes
apis.description: Returns the configured sales tax rates via `business.salesTaxes`.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Returns the authenticated user wrapped in a connection-style envelope (Wave's public schema exposes only the auth'd user).

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: Returns the authenticated Wave user node (id, defaultEmail, firstName, lastName).
